output.summary: Consolidated preset filter pills into .archive-active-filters. Deleted the separate .archive-preset-filters container from PHP and JS. When displayFilters=true, preset terms now render as non-interactive <span class="archive-preset-pill"> elements alongside interactive <button> pills inside .archive-active-filters. When displayFilters=false, no pills are shown at all. Updated CSS hide rule to account for preset spans.

changes: Modified .archive-active-filters loop: for each selected term, renders <span class="archive-preset-pill"> if term is a preset, or <button data-field data-value> if user-selected

Modified buildButtons(): now removes both button[data-field] and .archive-preset-pill elements before rebuild; renders preset values as <span class="archive-preset-pill"> and user values as interactive <button>
Updated hide rule from .archive-active-filters:has(button:only-child) to .archive-active-filters:not(:has(button[data-field], .archive-preset-pill)) so bar shows when only preset spans are present
Moved .archive-preset-pill styles from .archive .archive-preset-filters scope to .archive .archive-active-filters scope

validationResults.lint: failed (24 pre-existing errors in MainWrapper, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialsCarousel — none in Archive)
